---
title: "Dormancy / germination by environment"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#| message: false
library(tidyverse)
library(DHARMa)
library(mmrm)
library(here)
source(here("R/helpers.R"))
set.seed(123)
```

Loads the cleaned dormancy table, attaches F6 plant IDs (many-to-many
join via `id_f5_parent`), excludes strong-fungi rows, and computes
`germ_ratio` and `weeks_elapsed`. See `R/helpers.R` for details.

```{r}
#| message: false
dormancy_for_analysis <- prepare_dormancy_for_analysis()
```

## Dormancy model

mmrm = Mixed model for repeated measurements.

### Pop

#### glm (run 3 only)

```{r}
dormancy_pop_model <- glm(
  germ_ratio ~ pop, family = gaussian(),
  data = dormancy_for_analysis |> filter(run == 3)
)
summary(dormancy_pop_model)
```

```{r}
car::Anova(dormancy_pop_model, type = "III")
```

#### MMRM

```{r}
mmrm_dormancy_pop_model <- mmrm(
  germ_ratio ~ pop + us(run | id),
  data = dormancy_for_analysis
)
summary(mmrm_dormancy_pop_model)
```

```{r}
car::Anova(mmrm_dormancy_pop_model, type = "III")
```

### Ecotype

#### MMRM

```{r}
mmrm_dormancy_type_model <- mmrm(
  germ_ratio ~ ecotype + us(run | id),
  data = dormancy_for_analysis
)
summary(mmrm_dormancy_type_model)
```

```{r}
car::Anova(mmrm_dormancy_type_model, type = "III")
```

```{r}
time_summary <- dormancy_for_analysis |>
  group_by(run, ecotype) |>
  summarise(
    mean_germ = mean(germ_ratio, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_germ   = sd  (germ_ratio, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n         = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(weeks_elapsed = case_when(
    run == "1" ~ 0,
    run == "2" ~ 3,
    run == "3" ~ 6
  ))
```

```{r}
ggplot(time_summary, aes(x = weeks_elapsed, y = mean_germ, color = ecotype)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_germ - se_germ, ymax = mean_germ + se_germ),
                width = 0.2) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 3, 6),
                     labels = c("Run 1", "Run 2", "Run 3")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = ecotype_colors) +
  labs(
    x     = "Time (weeks)",
    y     = "Mean Germination Ratio",
    title = "Dormancy Loss Over Time by Environment Type"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

## Dormancy model per run

### Run 1

```{r}
dormancy_model_run_1 <- lme4::glmer(
  germ_ratio ~ ecotype + (1 | pop) + (1 | group),
  family = gaussian(),
  data   = dormancy_for_analysis |> filter(run == 1)
)
summary(dormancy_model_run_1)
```

### Run 2

```{r}
dormancy_model_run_2 <- lme4::glmer(
  germ_ratio ~ ecotype + (1 | pop) + (1 | group),
  family = gaussian(),
  data   = dormancy_for_analysis |> filter(run == 2)
)
summary(dormancy_model_run_2)
```

### Run 3

```{r}
dormancy_model_run_3 <- lme4::glmer(
  germ_ratio ~ ecotype + (1 | pop) + (1 | group),
  family = gaussian(),
  data   = dormancy_for_analysis |> filter(run == 3)
)
summary(dormancy_model_run_3)
```

```{r}
emmeans::contrast(
  emmeans::emmeans(dormancy_model_run_3, ~ ecotype),
  method = "pairwise", adjust = "tukey"
)
```

```{r}
# overdispersion?
simulation_out2 <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = dormancy_model_run_3)
testDispersion(simulation_out2)
# no overdispersion
```
